__fixture__.summary: A main workspace window with an editor split detaches a secondary preview or inspector window. Re-docking preserves pane identity, detached-window role, and visible focus without warping into a background pane.

topology.starting_arrangement: main window with editor split plus detached auxiliary preview window

preserve: stable pane ids and split order
last active tab in the auxiliary window

must_not_happen: focus jumps to a background window after re-dock
focus lands on a hidden pane or document body
closing the auxiliary window steals focus from the active editor
re-dock creates a fresh pane identity

safe_recovery_actions: Move focus to last active editor
